$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the internal bridge RESPONSE envelope shape (BridgeResp). Mirrors extension/src/shared/types.ts:BridgeResp; keep the two in sync (types.ts is not generated from this yet). `error` here is the extension-side free-text string per types.ts; the cross-process stable error CODES live in contracts/errors.json and are applied on the Rust side (see docs/architecture.md §11.1).
title: BridgeResp
description: The response posted back from the extension to the native host over the Port. Shape: { id, ok, data?, error? }.

id.description: Correlation id, echoed from the matching BridgeReq.

ok.description: Whether the op succeeded. When false, `error` carries a human-readable reason.

data.description: The op's payload on success. Shape varies per op; intentionally unconstrained (`unknown` in types.ts).

error.description: Human-readable failure reason when ok is false. The stable programmatic code is assigned from contracts/errors.json on the Rust side.
